creator: mt-bugs@markoturk.info
text:
Hi,

on 10-STABLE, after I updated giflib-nox11 to version 4.2.3_3,
gif2webp binary from webp-0.4.2_2 port fails with message:

Shared object "libgif.so.4" not found, required by "gif2webp"

Library libgif.so.4 does not exist anymore, it was replaced by libgif.so.5.

BR,
Marko
